ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "pdb" TEXT /* Protein database identifier for the protein being studied */,
  "antibody_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the antibody used in the experiment */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used for data collection */,
  "constraint" TEXT /* Constraints related to the experiment */,
  "site" INTEGER /* Site of the experiment or mutation */,
  "protein_structure" TEXT /* 3D structure of the protein being studied */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., completed, in-progress, pending) */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Researcher responsible for the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_constraint FOREIGN KEY ("constraint") REFERENCES constraints ("constraint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_antibody_id FOREIGN KEY ("antibody_id") REFERENCES antibodies ("antibody_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_method FOREIGN KEY ("method") REFERENCES methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "antibodies" (
  "antibody_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each antibody */,
  "antibody_name" TEXT /* Name or designation of the antibody */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the antibody (e.g., monoclonal, polyclonal) */,
  "sequence" TEXT /* Amino acid sequence of the antibody */,
  "iso_type" TEXT /* Isotype of the antibody (e.g., IgA, IgG, IgM) */,
  "concentration" REAL /* Concentration of the antibody used in experiments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("antibody_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment related to this result */,
  "wt" TEXT /* Wild type characteristic */,
  "om" TEXT /* Other modification characteristics */,
  "mutated" INTEGER /* Indicates if mutation occurred */,
  "wt_tot" REAL /* Total wild type interaction value */,
  "om_tot" REAL /* Total other modification value */,
  "d_tot" REAL /* Total delta value */,
  "wt_int" INTEGER /* Wild type interaction intensity */,
  "om_int" INTEGER /* Other modification interaction intensity */,
  "d_int" INTEGER /* Delta interaction intensity */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., binding, inhibition) */,
  "kinetic_rate" REAL /* Kinetic rate of the interaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the method used */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the method */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Instrument used for data collection */,
  "protocol" TEXT /* Detailed protocol used for the method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_methods_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "constraints" (
  "constraint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each constraint */,
  "constraint_type" TEXT /* Type of constraint (e.g., cons, unconstrained) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the constraint */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Additional parameters related to the constraint */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("constraint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution affiliation of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mutations" (
  "mutation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mutation */,
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the protein structure */,
  "site" INTEGER /* Site of the mutation */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of mutation (e.g., point mutation, deletion) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mutation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mutations_protein_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the publication was published */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
column_names: Protein database identifier for the protein being studied
Reference to the antibody used in the experiment
Site of the experiment or mutation
3D structure of the protein being studied
Status of the experiment (e.g., completed, in-progress, pending)
Name or designation of the antibody
Type of the antibody (e.g., monoclonal, polyclonal)
Amino acid sequence of the antibody
Isotype of the antibody (e.g., IgA, IgG, IgM)
Concentration of the antibody used in experiments
Unique identifier for each result entry
Reference to the experiment related to this result
Timestamp when the result was created
Timestamp when the result was last updated
Detailed protocol used for the method
Additional parameters related to the constraint
Type of mutation (e.g., point mutation, deletion)
Journal where the publication was published
